title: Dhara Compaction Summary
description: Schema for compaction summary files in a Dhara session. Compaction produces structured summaries that preserve key information without deleting original entries.

formatVersion.description: Semantic version of the compaction format.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this summary was created.

sourceEntries.description: IDs of the original entries being summarized. The originals are never deleted.

summary.description: Natural language summary of the source entries.

keyDecisions.description: Key decisions made during the summarized conversation.

filesCreated.description: Files that were created in the summarized entries.

filesModified.description: Files that were modified in the summarized entries.

commandsRun.description: Shell commands that were executed in the summarized entries.
